name: mern-azure-app
description: Complete MERN stack application ready for deployment on Vercel + Render

scripts.build: cd client && npm install && npm run build
scripts.install-all: npm install && cd client && npm install
scripts.clean: rm -rf node_modules client/node_modules && npm install && cd client && npm install
scripts.deploy: git add . && git commit -m "Deploy to production" && git push origin main
scripts.heroku-postbuild: NPM_CONFIG_PRODUCTION=false npm install --prefix client && npm run build --prefix client

author: Your Name
